subcodes.first_line: Take heed, O ye that have eyes to see! Take heed, O ye that are endued with sight! Reflect then, O ye that are possessed of thought [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فاعتبروا یا اولی الابصار ثم اعتبروا یا اولی الانظار ثم فکروا یا اولی الافکار
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @chastisement and requital, @consolation and comfort, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @justice and wrath of God
